title: SessionFinalizeResponseDTO
description: Finalization result of an optimization session. FAIL-CLOSED CONTRACT (RFC 0001 §3.6 / root Rule 1): when the session's promotion_policy declares a strict evidence mode (require_calibration.enabled) and no certified selection evidence exists, best_config is EMPTY and reason_code is NO_CERTIFIED_SELECTION — the server never synthesizes a raw best for strict sessions. CLOSED TAXONOMY (v4.5.0, enforced by oneOf): every response carries EXACTLY ONE of selection_basis (a winner and how it was selected) or reason_code (an honest no-winner and why) — producers must emit selection_basis=objective_best for non-strict winners and NO_RANKING_ELIGIBLE_TRIALS for empty non-strict sessions.

best_config.description: The selected configuration; EMPTY ({}) when reason_code is set.

reason_code.description: Present ONLY on honest no-winner results; consumers must not treat best_config as deployable when set.

selection_basis.description: How the winner was selected, present ONLY when best_config is non-empty (mutually exclusive with reason_code — ENFORCED by the allOf conditionals below). certified_selection: a strict session's winner backed by a client-attested certified-selection report, server-bound to its own trial record. objective_best: a non-strict raw objective winner. Consumers (FE) key off this field — never infer certification from tvl_governance internals.

selection_attestation.description: Content-free provenance of a certified selection (present IFF selection_basis=certified_selection — ENFORCED by the allOf conditionals below). HONESTY CONTRACT: the server cross-checked trial binding and per-CVAR coverage but did NOT verify the certificates' evidence — display as client-attested, never as server-verified.

sdk_version.description: Anchored version token — never free text (P8: no room for value/evidence snippets).

session_aggregation.description: OPTIONAL session-level rollup, echoed back IFF the finalize request carried a session_aggregation the server persisted (Traigent#1720/#1724 g2:agg-summary). Its presence is the SDK's confirmation that the rollup was actually stored — absence means an older backend dropped it, and the SDK reports persistence as degraded rather than succeeded.

strategy_preset.description: Optional advisory strategy preset metadata recorded for this session.

full_history.description: Per-trial history, present only when the finalize request set include_full_history.

allOf.description: reason_code (honest no-winner) requires an EMPTY best_config — the fail-closed Phase 7 contract, now enforced.
selection_attestation appears IFF the basis is certified_selection (forward direction).
certified_selection basis REQUIRES the attestation (reverse direction) — a certified winner is never unattributed.
